# sdk-example — Apps In Toss Community SDK reference

> Interactive reference app for `@apps-in-toss/web-framework`. Exercises every
> public SDK API in a browser, with no Toss app required (mock by
> `@ait-co/devtools`). Part of the Apps In Toss Community open-source project.

## What this is

`sdk-example` lets developers explore every Apps in Toss SDK API
(`@apps-in-toss/web-framework`) interactively in a regular browser. Each
domain page exposes the relevant SDK calls as `ApiCard` widgets that the user
can fill in and execute live. Combined with `@ait-co/devtools`, the SDK is
mocked at the import boundary so the same app boots without a device.

Deployed at https://sdk-example.aitc.dev.

## Stack

- React 19 + TypeScript strict (`noUncheckedIndexedAccess`)
- Vite 6, react-router-dom v7, Tailwind v4
- `@apps-in-toss/web-framework` (SDK), `@ait-co/devtools` (mock),
  `@ait-co/polyfill` (standard Web API shim)

## Routes

Each SDK domain has its own page. The home page shows all domains as cards.

- `/` — home, domain catalog
- `/auth` — Auth (appLogin, getUserKeyForGame, OIDC bridge)
- `/navigation` — Navigation (closeView, openURL, share, deep links)
- `/environment` — Environment (platform, network, server time, safe area)
- `/permissions` — Permissions
- `/storage` — Storage (setItem, getItem, removeItem, clearItems)
- `/location` — Location (current, watch)
- `/camera` — Camera
- `/contacts` — Contacts
- `/clipboard` — Clipboard
- `/haptic` — Haptic feedback
- `/iap` — In-app purchase workflow (Toss Pay)
- `/payment` — Payment (`requestTossPayPaysBilling` etc.)
- `/notification` — Notification (`requestNotificationAgreement`)
- `/ads` — AdMob (banner, interstitial, rewarded)
- `/game` — Game APIs
- `/analytics` — Analytics
- `/partner` — Partner APIs
- `/events` — `appsInTossEvent` subscriptions

## Related projects

- DevTools (browser emulator + unplugin): https://github.com/apps-in-toss-community/devtools
- Polyfill (standard Web API shim): https://github.com/apps-in-toss-community/polyfill
- Docs (community guide & reference): https://docs.aitc.dev
- Org landing: https://aitc.dev

- Repo: https://github.com/apps-in-toss-community/sdk-example
